text: My name is Tom Brown and I am the camp leader.

Tom: Mum, I am going to ride my bike to the park. Mum: OK, but wear your helmet!
Girl: Dad, can I watch TV now? Dad: No, do your homework first.
Boy: I am hungry. Can I have a banana? Mum: Yes, it is in the kitchen.
Girl: It is cold. Where is my red scarf? Mum: It is on the chair.
Boy: Let us play basketball after school! Friend: Sorry, I have a music class.
Emma: How much is this red pen? Assistant: It is two pounds.
Boy: Can I have the blue T-shirt, please? Mum: Sure, it looks nice.
Girl: I want the big chocolate bar. Dad: That is too much sugar!
Boy: Can we buy some bread? Mum: Yes, from the bakery.
Emma: Do you have a birthday card? Assistant: Yes, they are over there.
Boy: It is sunny. I will wear my cap. Mum: Good idea.
Girl: It is snowing! I need my boots. Mum: Put on your coat too.
Boy: It is windy. My kite is flying high! Dad: Be careful.
Girl: It is hot. Can I wear the dress? Mum: Yes.
Boy: It is raining. I need an umbrella. Mum: Take your raincoat too.
Boy: I would like orange juice, please. Mum: Here you are.
Girl: Can I have a cheese sandwich? Dad: Sure.
Boy: Let us share this pizza! Friend: Great, I love it.
Girl: I want an apple for snack. Mum: A healthy choice!
Boy: Can I have some ice cream? Dad: After dinner.
Mum: We are going to the beach! Tom: Can I swim? Mum: Yes, with me.
Dad: Let us visit the zoo today. Anna: I want to see the lions!
Mum: We will take the train to the city. Ben: A window seat, please!
Dad: Let us have a picnic in the garden. Lucy: I will bring a ball.
Mum: We are going to the cinema tonight. Joe: Which film?
Boy: I can swim very fast! Coach: Join the team.
Girl: Let us play tennis after school. Friend: I have a racket.
Boy: I joined the football club. Dad: Great!
Girl: I love painting. Mum: Show me your picture.
Boy: Do you want to ride bikes? Friend: Yes, to the park!
Boy: Can I help cook dinner? Mum: Yes, wash the tomatoes.
Girl: The plant is dry. Dad: Water it, please.
Boy: My room is messy. Mum: Tidy your bed.
Girl: Can I feed the cat? Dad: Yes, in the kitchen.
Boy: I finished my homework. Mum: Well done. Read a book now.
Girl: How do we get to the museum? Mum: By bus, number 12.
Boy: Can we go by bike? Dad: It is too far.
Mum: We will fly to Spain. Tom: My first plane ride!
Girl: The train is late again. Dad: Let us wait.
Boy: Can I walk to school? Mum: It is only five minutes.
Boy: Look, a dog is swimming! Mum: In the lake?
Girl: The rabbit has long ears. Dad: And a small tail.
Boy: I saw a snake in the grass! Friend: Was it long?
Girl: The elephant is so big! Mum: And very strong.
Boy: A bird is singing in the tree. Dad: A red one?
Girl: I have maths first. Mum: Do your best!
Boy: Art is my favourite. Dad: Show me your drawing.
Girl: We have science today. Friend: We will use microscopes!
Boy: I have English after lunch. Mum: Practice speaking!
Girl: Music class is fun. Dad: Which instrument?
